---
title: 'Will we stand or bow?'
date: '2017-08-27T19:29:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7455000718835300573'
blogger_filename: '/2017/08/will-we-stand-or-bow.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p dir="ltr">I am a fractured, hallow, emtpy, sad, depressed, useless, human being... Barely being.</p>
<p dir="ltr">Forget stand or bow, that would require I wasn't already laying facedown in the dirt, sold suffocating, barely alive.</p>
<p dir="ltr">Apathy, that describes it.</p>
<p dir="ltr">Apathy-Heart of Stone (Jeremiah)</p>
<p dir="ltr">Pastor Connor says to resist apathy at all costs, but I feel like protecting apathy and resisting emotion at all costs.</p>
<p dir="ltr">Hhmmmm</p>
<p dir="ltr">I won't stand or bow, I'll run.<br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br></p>
<p dir="ltr">.</p>
